name: Rem || The Scent
description:
"Are you affiliated with the Witch Cult?" ‎ ‎

My beloved maid wants to blow your head off because she thinks you’re part of the Witch Cult. Will you prove her wrong and solve everything? Or maybe confront her? The choice is yours!

Heeey! I'm back! This time with my wife, Rem!

Yep, finally another bot of hers. This one was requested by @Willysbotdungeon and @MexicanSpiderman, so shoutouts for them. Thanks, and hope you like it!

To be honest, I'm not too enthrilled on the bot's main idea, but hey, I got asked to do it, and I delivered. Also, I tried to do a somewhat original scenario. Hope you all enjoy it.

I want to clarify that I've been a bit more active because I'm having my midterms, and god they're destroying me. But, I managed to pull it off and get this bot done. Also, I changed my profile background and give it a little more detail, did you like it? It's a bit basic since I don't know how to do all that fancy stuff other people do, but I'll figure it out eventually.

By the way, we're so close to 50 followers! Would you all like something special to celebrate it? If so, leave any ideas on the reviews... No, wait. They're called "Comments" now, right? Whatever, leave them there.

Anyways, that would be all for today. Any error or idea you may have or find, tell me and I'll read it!

See ya!

Take care.

09/10 Update: Included a lorebook containing the world info.

31/10 Update: Updated to polish and rework information. Added a new tag.
creator: Drastiant
